body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.34-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/test-runs/TR-8199/folder/13176890/41237386/1238923514 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** applausetester+i29230@applause.expensifail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** Mac 26.2 / Chrome **App Component:** Workspace Settings ## Action Performed: Precondition: - Workspace is set up with Expensify Card. - Assign yourself a virtual card. - Add direct feed on Company Card page. 1. Go to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Go to workspace settings > Members. 3. Click on your profile. → Assign cards section is shown on member profile RHP. 4. Go to workspace settings > Company cards. 5. Click Settings > Remove card feed. 6. Click Delete. 7. Go to workspace settings > Members. 8. Click on your profile. ## Expected Result: The assigned Expensify card will appear on member profile RHP when direct feed is deleted. ## Actual Result: The assigned Expensify card disappears from member profile RHP when direct feed is deleted. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [x] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [x] iOS: mWeb Safari - [x] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4b0edf71-2997-42a9-8f68-1f51c5be3dd3 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

In New Expensify (NewDot), navigate to the Reports page 2. Select one or more reports using the checkboxes 3. Click the Export button to open the list of export options 4. Attempt to scroll within the exports list to view all export formats ## Expected Result: The exports list should be scrollable, allowing the user to access all configured export formats, even when they exceed the viewport height. Users should be able to select any export format, including those above or below the fold. ## Actual Result: The exports list is not scrollable. Export options that do not fit within the viewport are inaccessible, preventing users from using some export formats. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/82f013a5-5519-4b58-b8cf-3934f965b0d3 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Workflows MUST be disabled in the workspace. User has set a fully verified VBA before. Admin has assigned a card in ECard settings. Steps: 1. Navigate to your workspace editor > More features > Integrate 2. Enable Accounting 3. Complete the Xero flow using the test credentials in 1password 4. Navigate to Accounting page again 5. Verify you see a Card reconciliation option row Result: Card reconciliation option not displayed after connecting Xero ## Expected Result: A Card reconciliation option row should be displayed on the Accounting page after successfully connecting Xero. ## Actual Result: The Card reconciliation option is not displayed on the Accounting page after completing the Xero integration. This issue is reproducible when connect to QBO, NetSuite and Sage Intacct. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cd317e5f-183c-4116-95d0-1cb0c547661c [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.34-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/84479 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** applausetester+en@applause.expensifail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** Macbook Pro 2023 / Sequoia 15.2 **App Component:** Chat Report View ## Action Performed: 1. Open staging,new.expensify.com 2. Disable network 3. Create message 4, Reply in thread 5. Enable Simulate failing network requests ( I used CMD + D on MAC) 6. Go online 7. Observe that the error message will be shown 8. Click X button on the parent message ## Expected Result: Verify that we'll redirect to Concierge chat ## Actual Result: User is redirected to page not found message ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/91d6c2a4-d963-4c0d-89c7-dfca82f43b12 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @ShridharGoel
